intent: Analyse a single-cell ATAC-seq dataset. Use a small PUBLIC scATAC-seq dataset (e.g. 10x's PBMC scATAC, or a snapATAC2/episcanpy built-in). Do basic QC (TSS enrichment, fragment/feature counts), build the cell × peak (or bin) matrix, run TF-IDF/LSI, cluster, and show a UMAP coloured by cluster.

content.text: Analyse a single-cell ATAC-seq dataset. Use a small PUBLIC scATAC-seq dataset (e.g. 10x's PBMC scATAC, or a snapATAC2/episcanpy built-in). Do basic QC (TSS enrichment, fragment/feature counts), build the cell × peak (or bin) matrix, run TF-IDF/LSI, cluster, and show a UMAP coloured by cluster.

scenario: Cold-start (single prompt): analyse a PUBLIC scATAC-seq dataset (10x PBMC scATAC or snapATAC2/episcanpy built-in); QC (TSS, fragment/feature counts), peak/bin matrix, TF-IDF/LSI, cluster, UMAP. No local data — agent must fetch. Re-runnable as-is.
